sourceMovie.title: Erotic Ghost Story
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Erotic Ghost Story (1990) stuck because it commits to its fantasy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Lam Nai-Choi's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The fantasy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Before I Wake
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Erotic Ghost Story clicked for you, Before I Wake (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and drama, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Erotic Ghost Story?
faq.answer: Try Before I Wake, Dracula, Look Away—each shares DNA with Erotic Ghost Story while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Erotic Ghost Story?
faq.answer: Erotic Ghost Story (1990) is best described as Fantasy, Drama, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Erotic Ghost Story part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Erotic Ghost Story Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
